title: Flame Sweeping
description: Sweeping Attack with Fire Aspect Support!
body:
# Flame Sweeping
### Fire Aspect & Sweeping Attack - incompatible in vanilla?
### This mod makes them SYNERGIZE BEYOND LIMITS!
##  
This mod makes the Fire Aspect enchantment compatible with sweeping attack.  
Now sweeping attacks can ignite all creatures you attack! Enjoy yourself!
#  Notes 
- Theoretically supports Minecraft 1.14+.  
- Only needs to be installed on the server to take effect.  
- If there is a patch version, please download it preferentially! 
# Others
Any questions of Flame Sweeping can be reported to [Github](https://github.com/HO-Artisan/FlameSweeping/issues).  
如果你是中文用户，你可以选择访问[MCMOD](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/8828.html)。
